sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113004" key="xalima/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλιμ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n113004.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τὸ περὶ τὰς συνουσίας πείθεσθαι</ref> </xr> (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπτοῆσθαι</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:200" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">200</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χαλικ-</foreign> cod. Philem.Gloss.).</sense> </entryFree>
